form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to post a big 3.5 lengths win at Sale over 435m (24.82) beating Merry Myrtle in Maiden on April 1. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to post a big 3.5 lengths win at Sale over 435m (24.82) beating Merry Myrtle in Maiden on April 1. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked in back straight.
Slow to begin; Contacted on first turn.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 1.75 lengths fourth at this track (26.46) in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (26.45) at big odds over 460m at this track. Has a low draw. Deserves respect.

formComments.comment: Finished third last start (26.45) at big odds over 460m at this track. Has a low draw. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Ballarat over 390m in 22.63. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 400m at this track at Rank Limit - Grade 6 level. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.29) when seventh over 400m at this track in a Mix 6/7. Starts from box 5 for the first time here. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (25.16) over 435m at Sale. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on April 2 over 460m at this track behind Memphis Mack beaten 4.5 lengths (26.65) in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Mix 6/7 on April 3 over 460m at this track behind Full Noise beaten 9 lengths (26.56). Is a danger.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Mix 6/7 on April 3 over 460m at this track behind Full Noise beaten 9 lengths (26.56). Is a danger.

form.formComment: Returns from a four-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a eighth (26.67) over 460m at this track. Looks one of the better hopes in the race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a four-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a eighth (26.67) over 460m at this track. Looks one of the better hopes in the race.

form.formComment: Did a good job on debut at Sale to win by 2.75 lengths in 24.80, beating Bernardo Split. Last start finished last in a Mix 6/7 on April 3 over 460m at this track behind Full Noise beaten 14 lengths (26.91). Happy to risk this time.
